titles.text: Madagascar 3 & The Croods: Prehistoric Party Combo Pack

descriptions.text: In the Madagascar 3 & The Croods Prehistoric Party Combo Pack players of all ages will get to travel, adventure and explore in the exciting and worldly European locations of Madagascar 3! They'll also get the ultimate fun of a family party game with Croods-style action as they journey through 30 unique and addictive mini-games.
